summary: Iteration 111: Frontend-only testing for First Visit Tour feature. All 9 features verified successfully through code review and UI testing.

verified_features.details: Tour has 7 steps: welcome, pet-soul, pillars, celebrations, rewards, mira-intro, get-started. Verified in FirstVisitTour.jsx lines 56-330.

verified_features.feature: Tour progress bar and step indicators
verified_features.details: Progress bar at line 405-411 with gradient fill. Step indicators at lines 425-438 with active/completed states.
Skip button at line 414-420, Next button at line 478-494, Back button at line 468-476. All handlers implemented correctly.
useTour hook checks localStorage 'tour_completed' at line 507. Tour shows after 1.5s delay for new users.
HelpCircle button in bottom-left corner at MemberDashboard.jsx lines 623-633. Shows tooltip 'Take the tour again' on hover.

verified_features.feature: Home page Pet Life Operating System tagline
verified_features.details: Tagline visible at Home.jsx line 108. Also shown in banner at top of page. Verified via UI screenshot.
Navbar.jsx lines 586-604 shows 'Sign In' for guests, avatar+name for logged-in users. No confusing Account dropdown.
MiraTip component integrated at MemberDashboard.jsx line 916. Uses getMiraGuidanceContext for personalized messages.
MyCelebrations component integrated at MemberDashboard.jsx line 927. Shows upcoming birthdays, gotcha days with countdown.

test_credentials.note: No credentials needed - tested public pages and code review

context_for_next_testing_agent: First Visit Tour feature fully implemented: 1) 7-step tour (welcome, pet-soul, pillars, celebrations, rewards, mira-intro, get-started), 2) Progress bar with gradient fill, 3) Skip/Next/Back navigation, 4) localStorage 'tour_completed' check for new users, 5) Help button in bottom-left to replay tour, 6) Home page shows 'Pet Life Operating System' tagline, 7) Navbar shows 'Sign In' for guests (no Account dropdown), 8) MiraTip contextual guidance on dashboard, 9) MyCelebrations widget with countdown timers.
